title: ConfigurationTag
description: ConfigurationTag schema from Amazon Application Discovery Service API

configurationType.description: A type of IT asset to tag.

configurationId.description: The configuration ID for the item to tag.

key.description: A type of tag on which to filter.

value.description: A value on which to filter.

timeOfCreation.description: The time the configuration tag was created in Coordinated Universal Time (UTC).
